title: E2E tests for scheduler plugin (ghq-uik.3.2.6)
conversation_summary: Completed task ghq-uik.3.2.6: wrote 5 E2E tests for the Cortex scheduler sidecar plugin (spawn, CRUD, script execution, per-project isolation, crash recovery). Fixed multiple issues along the way: corrupt test DB causing Playwright timeout, sidecar init race condition, SidecarManager signal-kill crash detection, and made DB migrations idempotent. All 5 tests pass, 260/260 unit tests pass, committed and pushed to cortex main. Task closed in beads.
key_decisions: Made DB migrations v5-v7 idempotent with addColumnIfMissing helper to prevent duplicate column errors from partially-applied migrations
Added waitForSidecarReady pattern to handle async init race condition in sidecar protocol
Fixed SidecarManager crash detection: signal kills (SIGKILL) produce code=null which was not treated as a crash
Install message collectors BEFORE spawning/crashing sidecars to avoid missing events
